_comment: OCHA pin locator (location strip) — SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the numbers. Consumed by engine/pin_locator.py (both Titles & branding and statement clips). Layout: a map-pin icon left of a UN-blue rectangle with two white text lines (top = place, Raleway ExtraBold; bottom = date, Raleway Medium). Top-left placement. Motion mirrors the lower third's language (no fade; left-anchored wipe; staggered lines; cubic ease) plus a bottom-anchored scale-rebound for the pin. Change the look here; drawing logic lives in engine/pin_locator.py.
